mapper.select: SELECT C.company_id , C.company_code , C.company_name , CC.company_checkup_id , CC.checkup_year FROM company C JOIN ( SELECT company_id , MAX(checkup_year) AS checkup_year FROM company_checkup WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY company_id ) LAST_CC ON C.company_id = LAST_CC.company_id JOIN company_checkup CC ON LAST_CC.company_id = CC.company_id AND LAST_CC.checkup_year = CC.checkup_year WHERE C.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY CC.checkup_year DESC, C.company_name

SELECT reservation.checkuped_at FROM reservation JOIN employee_checkup EC ON reservation.employee_checkup_id = EC.employee_checkup_id AND (reservation.reservation_state = 2 OR reservation.reservation_state = 4) AND EC.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE EC.employee_checkup_id = (SELECT employee_checkup_id FROM employee_checkup WHERE user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM employee WHERE employee.employee_code = #{employeeCode} AND employee.myself = 1)) AND reservation.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT C.company_id , C.company_code , C.company_name , CC.company_checkup_id , CC.checkup_year FROM center_manager_company CMC INNER JOIN company C ON C.company_id = CMC.company_id INNER JOIN center_manager HM ON HM.user_id = CMC.user_id INNER JOIN center HC ON HC.center_id = HM.center_id JOIN ( SELECT company_id , MAX(checkup_year) AS checkup_year FROM company_checkup WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY company_id ) LAST_CC ON C.company_id = LAST_CC.company_id JOIN company_checkup CC ON LAST_CC.company_id = CC.company_id AND LAST_CC.checkup_year = CC.checkup_year WHERE CMC.deleted_at IS NULL AND C.deleted_at IS NULL AND HM.deleted_at IS NULL AND HC.deleted_at IS NULL AND HM.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY CC.checkup_year DESC, C.company_name
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO checkup_result ( hospital_id , registered_at , file_name , count , created_user_id , updated_user_id) VALUES( #{hospitalId} , NOW() , #{fileName} , #{count} , #{sessionUserId} , #{sessionUserId})
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.update: UPDATE checkup_result_item SET deleted_at = NOW() , deleted_user_id = #{sessionUserId} WHERE checkup_result_employee_id = (SELECT checkup_result_employee_id FROM checkup_result_employee WHERE checkup_result_id = #{checkupResultId} AND checkup_result_employee.deleted_at IS NULL)
mapper.select: SELECT checkup_result.checkup_result_id , checkup_result_employee.checkup_result_employee_id , company.company_code , company_checkup.checkup_year , hospital_center_view.hospital_code , hospital_center_view.center_code , hospital_center_view.hospital_center_name , checkup_result_employee.employee_name , checkup_result_employee.birth , checkup_result_employee.sex , checkup_result_employee.employee_code , checkup_result_employee.review , checkup_result_item.checkup_result_item_id , checkup_result_item.item_code , checkup_result_item.result_value , reservation.confirmed_at , reservation.checkuped_at FROM checkup_result_employee JOIN checkup_result ON checkup_result_employee.checkup_result_id = checkup_result.checkup_result_id AND checkup_result_employee.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN employee_checkup ON checkup_result_employee.employee_checkup_id = employee_checkup.employee_checkup_id AND employee_checkup.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN reservation ON employee_checkup.employee_checkup_id = reservation.employee_checkup_id AND (reservation.reservation_state != 0 OR reservation.confirmed_at IS NULL) JOIN company_checkup ON employee_checkup.company_checkup_id = company_checkup.company_checkup_id AND company_checkup.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN employee ON employee_checkup.user_id = employee.user_id AND employee.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN company ON employee.company_id = company.company_id AND company_checkup.company_id = company.company_id AND company.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN hospital_center_view ON checkup_result_employee.center_id = hospital_center_view.center_id JOIN checkup_result_item ON checkup_result_employee.checkup_result_employee_id = checkup_result_item.checkup_result_employee_id AND checkup_result_item.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE checkup_result_employee.deleted_at IS NULL AND employee.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY company_checkup.checkup_year, checkup_result_item.item_code
